title: Shri Shailputri Mata Ki Aarti
intro: Read Shri Shailputri Mata Ki Aarti in Hindi and seek the divine blessings of Goddess Shailputri.
description:
Shailputri Maa bail par savar,
Karen devta jai jaikar॥
Shiv Shankar ki priya Bhavani.
Teri mahima kisi ne na jaani॥
॥ Jai Maa Shailputri ki ॥

Parvati tu Uma kehlave.
Jo tujhe simre so sukh paave॥
Riddhi-Siddhi parvaan kare tu.
Daya kare dhanwan kare tu॥
॥ Jai Maa Shailputri ki ॥

Somvar ko Shiv sang pyari.
Aarti teri jisne utari॥
Uski sagri aas puja do.
Sagare dukh takleef mila do॥
॥ Jai Maa Shailputri ki ॥

Ghee ka sundar deep jala ke.
Gola gari ka bhog laga ke॥
Shraddha bhav se mantra gaayein.
Prem sahit phir sheesh jhukayein॥
॥ Jai Maa Shailputri ki ॥

Jai Giriraj Kishori Ambe.
Shiv mukh Chandra chakori Ambe॥
Manokamna purn kar do.
Bhakt sada sukh sampatti bhar do॥
॥ Jai Maa Shailputri ki ॥
